name_en: MONOGRAM White Crocodile with Gold Buckle
name_cn:
MONOGRAM White Crocodile with Gold Buckle
Phone Holder Mini Bag_
For the current super popular mini bag trend, this is definitely worth buying! Combines good looks and practicality, fits an iPhone Plus, so you can go out with just a phone!
Now mini bags are in style, just say goodbye to big wallets and switch to a small, exquisite chain bag~
Size: 18x11x2cm
Model: 635095
